name: shopping_journey

observed_strengths.observation: 5.0/5 friction score — no friction flags across the full PDP → add-to-cart → cart → checkout journey; tied for best score with zenrojas and deathwishcoffee among all 4 tested stores

cart_upsell_present: TRUE — mudwtr is the only store of all 4 tested where the cart upsell actually populated with live product recommendations; this is a proven AOV-lift mechanism active in production

urgency_elements_present: TRUE — urgency signal (free shipping threshold or countdown) is live in the cart; mudwtr is the only store of all 4 tested with confirmed cart urgency; pairs with upsell to maximize cart exit value
trust_badges_at_checkout: TRUE — payment security signals at the checkout entry step reduce drop-off at the highest-anxiety point of the funnel
8 payment methods confirmed (Visa, Mastercard, Amex, PayPal, Apple Pay, Shop Pay, Discover, JCB) — broad payment coverage; Shop Pay enables accelerated checkout for returning Shopify buyers

missing_or_weak.observation: No BNPL option detected (no Afterpay, Klarna, or Sezzle) — deathwishcoffee has Afterpay; at $40+ for a starter kit, buy-now-pay-later would lower price resistance for first-time buyers testing the product
4 clicks to checkout vs. deathwishcoffee's 3 — one additional click in the journey; not a significant barrier, but checkout friction is marginally higher than the best-in-class benchmark tested

purchase_path_notes: Best-in-class cart experience of all 4 stores tested: live upsell, live urgency, trust badges, 5.0/5. The cart upsell being live (vs. deathwishcoffee where it failed to populate) is the most differentiated CRO asset. Missing BNPL is the only material gap in payment coverage.
